narrative: Trump rejection of Iran proposal elevates Middle East risk premium — USD/JPY firms to 157.12 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets marginal risk-premium demand; gold higher +0.32% near $4,746; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.04%; VIX 18.4.
